services.description: Use a CSS grid or flex layout with clip-path polygons to create a honeycomb effect for service items.

hero_bg.alt: Dark audio mixing console with illuminated buttons

studio_mic.alt: Professional condenser microphone in dark studio lighting

studio_interior.alt: Heavy Hive Studio Interior with Blue LED lighting

instructions_to_main_agent: 2. FONTS: Add 'Anton' and 'Manrope' from Google Fonts in index.html or via import in index.css.
3. TAILWIND: Extend the tailwind.config.js with the custom colors (gold, obsidian) and font families defined above.
4. GLOBAL CSS: Set body background to #050505 and text to #EDEDED. Remove any default white backgrounds.
5. HERO SECTION: Create a full-screen hero with the 'hero_bg' image, a heavy black overlay (opacity 70%), and the main tagline centered. Use the 'Anton' font for the 'HEAVY HIVE' title.

6. SERVICES SECTION: Implement a responsive grid. Try to achieve a honeycomb look using CSS clip-path: polygon(50% 0%, 100% 25%, 100% 75%, 50% 100%, 0% 75%, 0% 25%). If too complex, use a strict grid with hexagonal borders.
7. PRICING: Create 3 cards. Use the 'gold_thin' border style. Highlight the 'Best Value' option with a filled gold header.
8. GALLERY: Use a masonry layout or a simple grid for the studio photos. Add a hover effect that zooms the image slightly.
9. CONTACT: Simple form with dark inputs (bg-secondary-light). Add social links (Instagram, Email) with large icons.

10. BOOKING: The 'Book Now' button must be prominent (Gold background, Black text) and link to Peerspace (use a placeholder link if actual URL is missing, but prompt implies direct booking goal - for now, link to contact or external booking).
11. ACCESSIBILITY: Ensure gold text on black has sufficient contrast. Use lighter gold (#F4C430) for text if needed.
universal_guidelines: Do not use gradients for text unless it is a very large heading.
Avoid 'Inter' font for headings. Use 'Anton' or 'Bebas Neue'.
Use 2x more padding than usual. Let the dark background breathe.
All interactive elements must have a hover state (color change or lift).
